+

+total_time = time.time() - start_time

+print(f'Completed {NUM_EPISODES} episodes in {total_time:.1f}s ({total_time/NUM_EPISODES:.1f}s/ep)')

+

+output = {

+    "primary_metric": "nav_seek_success",

+    "nav_seek_success": float(np.mean([p['nav_seek_success'] for p in per_episode])),

+    "social_nav_reward": float(np.mean([p['social_nav_reward'] for p in per_episode])),

+    "found_human_rate_over_epi": float(np.mean([p['found_human_rate_over_epi'] for p in per_episode])),

+    "safe_follow_steps": float(np.mean([p['safe_follow_steps'] for p in per_episode])),

+    "nav_to_pos_success": float(np.mean([p['nav_to_pos_success'] for p in per_episode])),

+    "per_episode": make_serializable(per_episode),

+    "total_episodes": NUM_EPISODES

+}
